scripts.build:drivers: npm run build:protocol && npm run build --workspace=@thoth/drivers
scripts.build:client: npm run build:protocol && npm run build:relay && npm run build --workspace=@thoth/client
scripts.build:daemon: npm run build:highlight && npm run build:protocol && npm run build:relay && npm run build --workspace=@thoth/client && npm run build --workspace=@thoth/drivers && npm run build --workspace=@thoth/tui && npm run build --workspace=@thoth/daemon
scripts.build:cli: npm run build:daemon && npm run build --workspace=@thoth/cli
scripts.build:release-runtime: npm --prefix packages/app/highlight run build && npm run build --workspace=@thoth/protocol && npm run build --workspace=@thoth/relay && npm run build --workspace=@thoth/client && npm run build --workspace=@thoth/drivers && npm run build --workspace=@thoth/tui && npm run build --workspace=@thoth/daemon && npm run build --workspace=@thoth/cli
scripts.build:app-deps: npm run build:highlight && npm run build:protocol && npm run build:relay && npm run build --workspace=@thoth/client
scripts.dev:daemon: bash -lc 'source scripts/dev-home.sh && configure_dev_thoth_home && exec npm run dev --workspace=@thoth/daemon'
scripts.smoke:tui:renderer: npm run build --workspace=@thoth/tui && npm exec --yes --package=node-linux-x64@26.4.0 -- node --experimental-ffi scripts/smoke-opentui-renderer.mjs
scripts.smoke:tui:navigation: npm run build --workspace=@thoth/tui && npm exec --yes --package=node-linux-x64@26.4.0 -- node --experimental-ffi scripts/smoke-opentui-navigation.mjs
scripts.smoke:tui:cli: npm run build --workspace=@thoth/tui && npm run build:cli && bash scripts/smoke-opentui-cli.sh
scripts.smoke:tui:cli:recovery: npm run build --workspace=@thoth/tui && npm run build:cli && bash scripts/smoke-opentui-cli-recovery.sh
scripts.smoke:tui:cli:workspace-register: npm run build --workspace=@thoth/tui && npm run build:cli && bash scripts/smoke-opentui-cli-workspace-register.sh
scripts.smoke:tui:cli:provider-setup: npm run build --workspace=@thoth/tui && npm run build:cli && bash scripts/smoke-opentui-cli-provider-setup.sh
scripts.smoke:tui:cli:device-pairing: npm run build --workspace=@thoth/tui && npm run build:cli && bash scripts/smoke-opentui-cli-device-pairing.sh
scripts.smoke:tui:pty-stress: npm run build --workspace=@thoth/tui && npm run build:cli && node scripts/smoke-opentui-pty-stress.mjs
scripts.smoke:desktop:ui-scorecard: npm --workspace=@thoth/desktop run test -- src/features/menu.test.ts && node scripts/smoke-desktop-ui-scorecard.mjs
scripts.build:foundation: npm run build:highlight && npm run build:protocol && npm run build:relay && npm run build --workspace=@thoth/client
scripts.typecheck:drivers: npm run build:protocol && npm run typecheck --workspace=@thoth/drivers
scripts.typecheck:foundation: npm run typecheck:highlight && npm run typecheck:protocol && npm run typecheck:relay && npm run typecheck:client
scripts.test:drivers: npm run build:protocol && npm run test --workspace=@thoth/drivers
scripts.eval:clarify: npm run build:drivers && npm run eval:clarify --workspace=@thoth/drivers
scripts.test:foundation: npm run test:highlight && npm run test:protocol && npm run test:relay && npm run test:client
scripts.check:foundation: npm run validate:repo && npm run format:check && npm run lint:foundation && npm run build:foundation && npm run typecheck:foundation && npm run test:foundation
